---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for connectors, configuration handling, testing, or developer workflow.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

**Language:** English | [Deutsch](feature_request.de.md)

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Problem or motivation
What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe your proposed approach.

## Alternatives considered
Describe alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Expected benefit
What improvements do you expect (usability, maintainability, security, performance, etc.)?

## Security, compatibility, or configuration impact
Please describe any expected impact on:
- Security behavior/policies
- Connector compatibility (Apache/NGINX/others)
- Configuration directives or defaults
- CI/build/runtime validation
